title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SWEET HOME VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 799 Long Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 367-3888 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 367-3888 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near the intersection of Highway 20 and Highway 228 in Sweet Home past the East Linn Museum and across from the Sweet Home Inn. Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SWEET HOME
